lines.speaker: facilities-goblin
lines.text: Good news. The pipes still scream, which means the floor is alive.

lines.speaker: former-executive-assistant
lines.text: That is not, under any recognized policy, good news.

lines.speaker: security-skeleton
lines.text: It is the best news this building usually offers.

lines.speaker: former-executive-assistant
lines.text: Left path says ‘priority access.’ Right path says ‘surprise evaluation.’

lines.speaker: facilities-goblin
lines.text: Take the one with exposed wiring.

lines.speaker: security-skeleton
lines.text: At least that sign is being honest.

lines.speaker: security-skeleton
lines.text: Please remain calm. Panic creates paperwork.

lines.speaker: facilities-goblin
lines.text: Panic also creates openings.

lines.speaker: former-executive-assistant
lines.text: Wonderful. We’re workshopping a brand.

lines.speaker: facilities-goblin
lines.text: Did you see that? I fixed the room with violence.

lines.speaker: former-executive-assistant
lines.text: That was not repair.

lines.speaker: security-skeleton
lines.text: In this building, the distinction is academic.

lines.speaker: former-executive-assistant
lines.text: No legitimate benefits package glows.

lines.speaker: facilities-goblin
lines.text: Counterpoint: free stuff.

lines.speaker: security-skeleton
lines.text: Counter-counterpoint: nothing in Meridian is free. Some of it is merely prepaid.

lines.speaker: security-skeleton
lines.text: I have guarded five executive floors and three mass apologies. This is worse.

lines.speaker: facilities-goblin
lines.text: Can I keep whatever jumps out?

lines.speaker: former-executive-assistant
lines.text: Only if it is useful, deniable, or both.

entries.title: When the Player Is Close to Death

lines.speaker: former-executive-assistant
lines.text: You are not dying in front of middle management. That encourages them.

lines.speaker: facilities-goblin
lines.text: Hold still. I can make this survivable or interesting.

lines.speaker: security-skeleton
lines.text: Aim for survivable. We’ve already had interesting.

lines.speaker: facilities-goblin
lines.text: Big door. Fancy lights. Something expensive behind it.

lines.speaker: former-executive-assistant
lines.text: Something promoted behind it.

lines.speaker: security-skeleton
lines.text: Same thing.

reward_packages.name: Patch Stack
reward_packages.description: Clean up messes. Fixes, cleanse, control.

reward_packages.name: Hostile Takeover
reward_packages.description: Hit first. Hit harder. End arguments.

reward_packages.name: Escalation Clause
reward_packages.description: More status. More spread. More problems.

reward_packages.name: Lunch-and-Learn
reward_packages.description: Companion juice. Synergy now, payoff later.

reward_packages.name: Expense Account
reward_packages.description: More resources, better upgrades, richer run.

reward_packages.name: Back Channel
reward_packages.description: Better draw, better setup, uglier tricks.

reward_packages.name: Overtime Spiral
reward_packages.description: Repeat actions, chain turns, snowball momentum.

reward_packages.name: Budget Freeze
reward_packages.description: Slow enemies down and choke their plans.

defeat_next_run_ideas.line: You brought a memo to a knife fight. Start next run with faster damage or cheaper control.
The Spire did not beat you quickly. It beat you professionally. Bring sustain.
Your bloodstream got audited. Pack cleanse, prevention, or shorter fights.

defeat_next_run_ideas.trigger_label: Your build came online too late.
defeat_next_run_ideas.line: Great long-term vision. Shame about the short term. Front-load your first three floors.
You survived the meeting and lost to the follow-up. Add a real finisher.
This run died in committee. Pick one lane and overfund it.
You chose greed over safety and Meridian noticed. Take the boring door once in a while.
Good personalities. Bad team. Bring companions who solve the same problem on purpose.

defeat_next_run_ideas.trigger_label: Defense was fine, damage was not.
defeat_next_run_ideas.line: Congratulations on your very durable collapse. Convert safety into pressure sooner.

defeat_next_run_ideas.trigger_label: Damage was fine, defense was not.
defeat_next_run_ideas.line: You nearly won the sprint and lost the building. Add one plan for when the enemy gets a turn.
